mapper.select: SELECT u.username, ROUND(AVG(sc.score), 2) AS avgScore FROM user u JOIN student_course sc ON u.id = sc.student_id AND sc.is_deleted = 0 WHERE u.role_type = 'STUDENT' AND u.is_deleted = 0 AND sc.score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY u.id, u.username HAVING avgScore IS NOT NULL ORDER BY avgScore DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN avgScore BETWEEN 0 AND 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section1, SUM(CASE WHEN avgScore BETWEEN 21 AND 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section2, SUM(CASE WHEN avgScore BETWEEN 41 AND 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section3, SUM(CASE WHEN avgScore BETWEEN 61 AND 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section4, SUM(CASE WHEN avgScore BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS section5 FROM (SELECT u.id, AVG(sc.score) AS avgScore FROM user u JOIN student_course sc ON u.id = sc.student_id AND sc.is_deleted = 0 WHERE u.role_type = 'STUDENT' AND u.is_deleted = 0 AND sc.score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY u.id) AS user_avg
